items.label: Dispatch
items.summary: Cut morning huddle time in half.
items.title: Dispatch handoff in 5 minutes, not 50.
items.description: Open dispatches, free drivers, in-transit trucks, and late stops on one screen — so dispatchers stop hunting and start handing off.
items.pull: Plan once. Hand off once. Stop chasing updates across three apps.

items.label: Freight
items.summary: Detailed dispatch records that scale with complexity.
items.title: Multi-stop dispatches, customer rules, and documentation in one place.
items.description: Stops, drops, hooks, accessorials, customer rules, and documentation all attach to the dispatch itself — preserved through replans and handoffs.
items.pull: When a dispatch grows complex, the record grows with it — without losing context.

items.label: Money
items.title: Billing, settled.
items.description: Rates, accessorials, expenses, and approvals flow from delivered freight into accounting and AR — including QuickBooks Online where you connect it. Driver pay calculates on the same line.
items.pull: Delivered to deposited. No bridge spreadsheet, no Friday cleanup.

items.label: Your rules
items.summary: Kill the "that's just how the system works" excuse.
items.title: Built around your operation, not a template.
items.description: Terminals, customer accessorials, pay rules, integrations — configured to your operation. Not a template that hammers you into someone else's flow.
items.pull: Built to your operation, not against it. The way it should have been the first time.
